name: Monetr
description: A budgeting application focused on planning for recurring expenses
compose:
name: slashnode-monetr
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:17.9
    container_name: monetr-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: m0netrPass123
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: monetr
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  valkey:
    image: valkey/valkey:9
    container_name: monetr-valkey
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - valkey_data-valkey:/data
  monetr:
    image: ghcr.io/monetr/monetr:1.15.1
    container_name: monetr-monetr
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - serve
      - '--migrate'
      - '--generate-certificates'
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
      valkey:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      MONETR_ALLOW_SIGN_UP: ${MONETR_ALLOW_SIGN_UP:-true}
      MONETR_PROOF_OF_WORK_ENABLED: ${MONETR_PROOF_OF_WORK_ENABLED:-false}
      MONETR_PG_USERNAME: postgres
      MONETR_PG_PASSWORD: m0netrPass123
      MONETR_PG_DATABASE: monetr
      MONETR_PG_ADDRESS: monetr-db
      MONETR_PG_PORT: '5432'
      MONETR_REDIS_ENABLED: 'true'
      MONETR_REDIS_ADDRESS: monetr-valkey
      MONETR_REDIS_PORT: '6379'
      MONETR_STORAGE_ENABLED: ${MONETR_STORAGE_ENABLED:-true}
      MONETR_STORAGE_PROVIDER: ${MONETR_STORAGE_PROVIDER:-filesystem}
    volumes:
      - monetr_data-app:/etc/monetr
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8379:4000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-monetr_db_data-db
  valkey_data-valkey:
    name: slashnode-monetr_valkey_data-valkey
  monetr_data-app:
    name: slashnode-monetr_monetr_data-app
